center.name: George Such
center.summary: George Such是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括飘带尾霸鹟、Large-tailed antshrike，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The large-tailed antshrike (Mackenziaena leachii) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Argentina, Brazil, Paraguay, and Uruguay.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The streamer-tailed tyrant (Gubernetes yetapa) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, and Paraguay, and as a vagrant to Uruguay.Remsen, J
